What We Do

A full ecosystem,
not just a service.

From concept to execution — we cover every axis of digital creation so your vision arrives whole.

💻

Web & Software Engineering

Production-grade websites, web apps, and SaaS tools — engineered for speed, scale, and maintainability.

Full-Stack
🤖

AI & Intelligent Systems

LLM integrations, automation pipelines, AI-powered dashboards, and custom models — built for real-world deployment.

GPT · Claude · Gemini
🎨

Branding & Visual Design

Identity systems, UI design, motion graphics, and brand strategy that communicate authority before a word is read.

Identity · UI · Motion
📚

Education Technology

CBT portals, online courses, study tools, and learning platforms that make knowledge accessible and measurable.

EdTech
🔬

Research & Innovation

Deep-dive research, white papers, competitive analysis, and strategy consulting for leaders who make data-driven decisions.

Strategy · Analysis
📊

Content & Publications

Illustrated magazines, infographics, data visualizations, and editorial content that turns complex ideas into clear stories.

Editorial · Data Viz
🏛️
Durgesh Borse Founder, Niti Forge

The Founder

Built by someone
who actually studies.

I'm a UPSC/MPSC aspirant and educator who got tired of the gap between what knowledge tools should be and what they actually are. Niti Forge is my attempt to close that gap — using design, code, and AI to build things that matter.

As the founder of Niti Pathshala, I've built test portals, illustrated magazines, branding systems, and AI-powered learning tools from scratch. Niti Forge is where all of that expertise is available to you.

100+
Deliverables shipped
5+
Domains of expertise
∞
Curiosity
1
Studio, zero compromise

How We Work

Four steps,
zero ambiguity.

A clear process means you always know where your project stands and what's coming next.

01

Discover

We map your goals, constraints, and context before writing a single line of code or a single pixel.

02

Architect

We plan the structure — information architecture, tech stack, design direction — and align on scope.

03

Build

Rapid iteration with weekly deliverables. You see real progress, not status updates about progress.

04

Launch & Evolve

We ship, measure, and refine. Projects don't go dark after delivery — they grow.
